description_long: This is a beaded necklace composed of a series of spherical, gold-toned beads strung together on a delicate, thin chain. The beads are evenly spaced and appear to be made of a polished material, giving them a lustrous, reflective surface. The necklace is displayed on a contoured, matte-finished jewelry bust, which is not part of the wearable item. The chain connecting the beads is fine and subtle, likely made of a metal such as gold or copper, and is only partially visible between the beads. The overall design is classic and symmetrical, with the largest bead positioned at the center front. The necklace exudes a timeless, minimalist elegance suitable for both casual and formal urban settings.
description: A gold-toned beaded necklace with polished spherical beads strung on a fine chain, displayed on a jewelry bust. The design is classic, symmetrical, and minimalist.
description_view_0: Front view showing the necklace draped across the bust, with the beads partially visible at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the spherical beads and the way they curve around the bust's contour.
description_view_2: Direct front view displaying the full arrangement of beads and the central, largest bead.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the bead sequence and chain curvature.
